CustomField.description: Set to true by NEPA_Timeline_Risk_Assessor when the time spent in the Scoping stage exceeds the agency-specific Scoping_Cap_Months__c from NEPA_Agency_Scoping_Baseline__mdt. Elevates timeline risk tier and triggers early warning.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Scoping phase has exceeded the agency-specific baseline duration. Review scoping scope and resource allocation.
CustomField.label: Scoping Overrun Flag
